title: 桜花賞の後に・重なる、あの日

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately following the Oka Sho, the
overwhelming cheers of the crowd pull Mejiro
Dober into a traumatizing flashback.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suppressing her tremors the best she can, Mejiro
Dober continues to desperately train for the
Japanese Oaks. I can tell something is off
though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, having noticed the change in
Mejiro Dober's behavior, Air Groove asks me if
she can talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clueless as to how I can help Mejiro Dober
myself, I give Air Groove my permission.
